name: ml-intern
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        huggingface /

      ml-intern  

    
      🤗 ml-intern: an open-source ML engineer that reads papers, trains models, and ships ML models
summary: 🤗 ml-intern 是一个开源机器学习工程师项目，能自动阅读论文、训练模型并部署 ML 模型，值得关注因为它实现了端到端自动化机器学习流程。

name: claude-code-templates
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        davila7 /

      claude-code-templates  

    
      CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code
summary: 该项目是一个用于配置和监控Claude Code的Python命令行工具，值得关注因为它能帮助开发者更高效地管理Claude代码项目。

name: Roo-Code
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        RooCodeInc /

      Roo-Code  

    
      Roo Code gives you a whole dev team of AI agents in your code editor.
summary: Roo-Code 是一个基于 AI 智能代理的代码编辑器插件，能在开发环境中提供类似完整开发团队的自动化辅助功能，值得关注因为它能显著提升开发效率。

name: build-your-own-x
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        codecrafters-io /

      build-your-own-x  

    
      Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.
summary: 该项目收集了从零开始重建各种流行技术（如数据库、操作系统等）的教程，帮助开发者通过实践深入理解技术原理，值得关注因其提供了系统性的编程学习路径。

name: awesome-codex-skills
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        ComposioHQ /

      awesome-codex-skills  

    
      A curated list of practical Codex skills for automating workflows across the Codex CLI and API.
summary: 这是一个精选的实用Codex技能列表，用于自动化Codex CLI和API的工作流程，值得关注因为它能提升开发效率。

name: posthog
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        PostHog /

      posthog  

    
      🦔 PostHog is an all-in-one developer platform for building successful products. We offer product analytics, web analytics, session replay, error tracking, feature flags, experimentation, surveys, data warehouse, a CDP, and an AI product assistant to help debug your code, ship features faster, and keep all your usage and customer data in one stack.
summary: PostHog是一个全栈开发者平台，提供产品分析、会话回放、功能开关等工具，帮助开发者快速构建和优化产品，值得关注因为它整合了多种开发工具于一体。

name: ds2api
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        CJackHwang /

      ds2api  

    
      Deepseek to API: A lightweight, high-performance full-stack middleware converting client protocols to universal APIs. Supports multi-account rotation, compiled binaries, Vercel Serverless, and Docker. Compatible with Google, Claude, and OpenAI API formats.
summary: ds2api是一个轻量级高性能的全栈中间件，可将客户端协议转换为通用API，支持多账号轮换、编译二进制文件、Vercel Serverless和Docker，兼容Google、Claude和OpenAI API格式，值得关注因其高效和广泛兼容性。

name: free-claude-code
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        Alishahryar1 /

      free-claude-code  

    
      Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw
summary: 该项目提供免费使用Claude AI代码工具的方式，支持终端、VSCode插件和Discord等多种平台，值得关注因为它让开发者能便捷地体验AI编程辅助功能。
